Title: Customizable Unisex T-Shirt Blank Template for Printing Transfers
Description:
Develop your unique apparel designs with this professional t-shirt blank template. Perfect for screen printing, heat transfer vinyl (HTV), and direct-to-garment (DTG) printing techniques.

This comprehensive mockup includes all necessary parts: front, back, sleeves (left/right), collar, and waistband. It provides accurate measurements and clean guidelines, making it easy for professional artists and crafters.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Full Versatility: Includes defined sections for the front, back, both sleeves, collar, and waistband, allowing for complex, multi-area designs.
  • Ideal for Beginners & Pros: Whether you are a hobbyist or a commercial printer, this guide provides the structure needed for flawless design execution.
  • Versatile Use Cases: Excellent for creating custom merchandise for family reunions, band merch, retail lines, school spirit wear, and personal gifts.

Material Focus:

Use this template to visualize designs that will translate beautifully onto various garment types, including cotton, poly-blend, and jersey knits. Focus on designs that enhance the perceived comfort, fit, and durability of the finished product.

Start creating your next best-selling line today!
